originalTitle: A big dividend cut and a $2 billion charge: Conagra’s results signal more pain ahead for food industry
summary: Conagra Brands’ stock was up a bit on Thursday, but the company’s results and forecast were the latest dose of bad news for the packaged-food industry.
content: Conagra Brands’ stock was up a bit on Thursday, but the company’s results and forecast were the latest dose of bad news for the packaged-food industry.
chineseTitle: 大幅削减股息和 20 亿美元费用：康尼格拉的业绩预示着食品行业未来将面临更多痛苦
chineseSummary: 康尼格拉品牌公司的股价周四小幅上涨，但该公司的业绩和预测是包装食品行业最新的坏消息。
chineseContent: 康尼格拉品牌公司的股价周四小幅上涨，但该公司的业绩和预测是包装食品行业最新的坏消息。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
